chapter_title.en: The meaning of terms mentioned in the Book and the Tradition about Monotheism

text: وبهذا الاسناد: عن محمد بن إسماعيل، قال: حدثنا علي بن العباس، قال: حدثنا عبيس بن هشام، عن عبد الكريم بن عمرو، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام في قوله عز وجل: " فإذا سويته ونفخت فيه من روحي " قال: من قدرتي.

en.basel-kadem: 13. With this chain, from Muhammed bin Isma’il, that he said: We were told by Ali bin Abbas, that he said: We were told by ‘Abees bin Hisham, from Abdul-Kareem bin Amru, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, with regards to His saying, Exalted and Glorious is He: «And When I proportioned him and I blew into him from My Spirit» [15:29] that he said: (It means) From My Ability.
